pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.3.0 to 3.2.0 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespace instead of Java EE, causing compile failures if not upgraded.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 8 settings on a Java 21 JDK or vice-versa causes incompatibility; Spring Boot 3 requires Java 17+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new MySQL Connector/J artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and removed in newer versions; 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is required for compatibility with Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
